name: Dara Ó Briain
blurb: Dara O Briain is an Irish comedian and television presenter based in the United Kingdom, noted for fast, audience-driven observational stand-up and for hosting topical panel shows such as Mock the Week and The Panel.
bio: Dara O Briain is an Irish comedian and television presenter based in the United Kingdom, noted for fast, audience-driven observational stand-up and for hosting topical panel shows such as Mock the Week and The Panel. A former mathematics and theoretical physics student, he frequently builds material around science, logic and everyday absurdity. He has toured internationally and appeared many times on Live at the Apollo.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up on the Irish circuit while working at RTE
Hosts the Irish panel show The Panel
His Edinburgh Fringe run is the festivals biggest-selling solo comedy show
Begins hosting Mock the Week on BBC Two
Nominated for a BAFTA TV Award for Best Entertainment Performance
His childrens book Beyond the Sky is nominated for a Blue Peter Book Award

accolades: BAFTA TV Award nomination for Best Entertainment Performance (2012)
Record number of appearances on Live at the Apollo
Long-running host of Mock the Week
